title: Wholesome Smoky Pillowy Coconut Pancake
description: This dehydrated macrobiotic-friendly recipe combines coconut milk with smoky flavors to create a fluffy and crowd-pleasing pancake dish.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 150°C (300°F). Grease a baking dish with coconut oil.
Mix together desiccated coconut, ground chile flakes, and sea salt in a small bowl. Add warm water and agave nectar/honey, stirring until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the greased baking dish. Bake for 1 hour or until set and slightly puffy.
Allow to cool before dehydrating at 45°C (113°F) for up to 20 hours or until dry. Store in an airtight container.
Serve as a macrobiotic dessert, spread with vegan butter or coconut cream if desired.
